email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Warehouse Assistant bij SQUARE CITY. Uw oproep voor een hands-on teamspeler met oog voor detail sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

In mijn rol bij Katoen Natie (2025-2026) werkte ik in een hoogvolume, snel logistiek klimaat waar nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie centraal stonden. Ik voerde fysieke controles uit, hield administratie bij en ondersteunde het team. Daarnaast heb ik als junior digital marketer bij Episto ervaring met administratieve verwerking, rapportage en systemen zoals Microsoft Office en Google Workspace.

Ik ben fysiek fit, stipt en betrouwbaar, en beschik over een eigen wagen. Mijn technische achtergrond helpt mij snel met nieuwe systemen overweg te kunnen. Ik spreek Engels (professioneel) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding).

Ik kijk ernaar uit mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Warehouse Assistant position at SQUARE CITY. Your call for a hands-on team player with an eye for detail perfectly matches my experience.

In my role at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) I worked in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment where accuracy and efficiency were key. I performed physical checks, maintained administration, and supported the team. Additionally, as a junior digital marketer at Episto I have experience with administrative processing, reporting, and systems such as Microsoft Office and Google Workspace.

I am physically fit, punctual, and reliable, and I have my own car. My technical background helps me quickly adapt to new systems. I speak English (professional) and Dutch (B1, currently taking classes).

I look forward to explaining my motivation and skills in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Warehouse Assistant bij SQUARE CITY. Uw oproep voor een hands-on teamspeler met oog voor detail en een leergierige houding sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn recente ervaring als magazijnmedewerker bij Katoen Natie (2025-2026) werkte ik in een hoogvolume, snel logistiek klimaat. Ik voerde fysieke controles uit op goederen, controleerde labels en volledigheid van ladingen, en hield administratieve gegevens bij. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd hoe belangrijk stiptheid, betrouwbaarheid en teamwerk zijn in een magazijnomgeving.

Daarnaast heb ik als junior digital marketer bij Episto (2026-heden) gewerkt met administratieve systemen, rapportage en Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook). Ik ben technisch geëngageerd en kan snel overweg met nieuwe software. Mijn ervaring met het bouwen en onderhouden van websites in WordPress heeft mijn oog voor detail en gestructureerd werken verder versterkt.

Ik ben fysiek fit, beschik over een eigen wagen en ben bereid zowel bureau- als magazijnwerk te verrichten. Mijn leergierige houding en groeiende kennis van het Nederlands (B1, in opleiding) maken dat ik me snel kan aanpassen en ontwikkelen binnen uw team.

Ik kijk ernaar uit mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Warehouse Assistant position at SQUARE CITY. Your call for a hands-on team player with an eye for detail and a willingness to learn perfectly matches my profile.

In my recent experience as a warehouse worker at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) I worked in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment. I performed physical checks on goods, checked labels and completeness of shipments, and maintained administrative records. This experience taught me the importance of punctuality, reliability, and teamwork in a warehouse setting.

Additionally, as a junior digital marketer at Episto (2026-present) I have worked with administrative systems, reporting, and Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook). I am technically engaged and can quickly adapt to new software. My experience building and maintaining websites in WordPress has further strengthened my attention to detail and structured work approach.

I am physically fit, have my own car, and am willing to perform both desk and warehouse work. My eagerness to learn and growing Dutch skills (B1, currently taking classes) enable me to adapt and develop quickly within your team.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and skills in a personal interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026): maintained accuracy and efficiency in high-volume logistics environment
Physically fit, hands-on mentality, punctual and reliable
Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and technically engaged with systems
Own car available; willing to perform both desk and warehouse work
B1 Dutch (currently taking classes) and professional English; quick learner
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and hands-on warehouse experience at Katoen Natie. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance. My warehouse background taught me accuracy, efficiency, and teamwork in a fast-paced logistics environment. Comfortable with administrative systems, Microsoft Office, and reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Warehouse & logistics: physical checks, label verification, administrative data processing, reporting, team support
- Microsoft Office: Word, Excel, Outlook
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Performed physical checks on goods, verified labels and completeness of shipments
- Supported team with administrative data processing and reporting

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
